question: Match each Appian process flow element with its correct description.

matches.D1: Can be added to a flow or attached to a smart service to trigger an Exception Flow or an Escalation.
matches.D2: Can accept one incoming path and select one outgoing path.
matches.D3: Can accept multiple paths: when all paths arrive, all outgoing flows are executed at the same time.

question: Match each scenario with the correct database relationship type.

pairs.term: You have an order with order items.
You have many employees on multiple projects.
You have a product with basic fields and an additional detailed product description with all the technical details that is regularly updated.

question: In what order is the following done when you are needing to implement a new column on an existing db table? This table, its CDTs, and data store entity are currently in use by an Appian application.
Match each refresh parameter with its correct behavior description.

matches.D2: Refresh when a specific variable changes
matches.D3: Refresh when any referenced variable changes
matches.D4: Refresh each time the value of any variable it references within the value parameter is updated
